name: Hoppin' John Jambalaya
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds smoked hot sausage, sauteed and sliced
1 pound salt pork, boiled 15 minutes, cut into small pieces
1 pound black-eyed peas, boiled until about half-cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a Dutch oven or other large pot over medium heat.
2. Add onion, green pepper, parsley, and garlic; saute for about 10 minutes.
3. Add sausage, salt pork, peas, and chicken broth; bring to boil.
4. Add rice and return to boil. Cover tightly and simmer for about 45 minutes; do not lift lid.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste and add chopped green onions. Mix well.
6. Let stand for about 5-10 minutes before serving.
Makes 12 - 16 servings.
